57351.title: Electric 80s!
57351.description: Tune in as we play all of the biggest electronic hits from the 80s!

57352.title: Greatest 80s Rock: Play It Loud!
57352.description: Hard! Alternative! Heavy! Post-punk! Metal! Indie! Goth! Call it what you want, but turn up the volume as we delve into the decade's best rock tracks in all their incarnations, right here on MTV80s!

57353.title: ... So 80s!
57353.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
